description: Designed user-facing handouts using Canva and Microsoft Word, ensuring a professional and consistent visual layout.
Structured information into easy-to-read formats, prioritizing a clear information layout for the end-user.
Applied UI/UX design principles to optimize the printed materials.
Modernized legacy API services with a cloud-first architecture using AWS (RDS, Lambda in C#, API Gateway, Fargate, S3, VPC, Route 53, Load Balancer, etc.)
Participated in team discussions and technical problem-solving sessions.
Resolved help desk tickets and maintained Apple and Windows devices.
Diagnosed and resolved issues with network printers, phones, and projectors
Managed inventory tracking of MacBooks and iPads assigned to students.
